entry.title: Re: Datasphere Analytic Model oData: 404 Resource Not Found
entry.content: I have missed the fact that there is the option to generate the oData Request URL directly from Datasphere. I guess my problem was that I was only inputting the mandatory variables that appeared in the model prompt, but for oData the expectation is that you fill all of them. With that said, what value should I put if I don't want a filter to be applied? For example if I have a variable called _0PLANT and I want to consider all values, I would simply leave it blank in the Preview prompt, however in the URL generator, I have to fill it out. What would be the value equivalent to leaving it blank in the Data Preview variable prompt of the Analytic Model?

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass access
entry.content:
Dear,

I was looking for an exhaustive list of what all actions a person can do in Fieldglass.

Same thing as this list that exists for SAP Ariba: SAP Ariba Procurement Solutions Group Descriptions Table | SAP Help Portal

 

Can anyone help with this?

Kind regards,

Tom

SAP Fieldglass Vendor Management System

entry.title: Re: A Small Change for a Greener Tomorrow
entry.content: That's true. Every single drop adds to the ocean. It is the 'collective individual actions' that makes a huge difference. Single remote catalyst can be attain critical mass to tilt the scale. I think the scale has already tilted as you can see in the recent UN climate talks. Cheers.

entry.title: Performance Form transfer for International Assignees
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently when there is an international transfer, HR has to download the Performance Form from the Home profile and upload the form to the Host profile. Then employee will manually copy and paste their objectives.

Is there no feature that can reduce this manual workaround?

Appreciate if we can get any advise on this.

Thank you

entry.title: Are there any practice questions/papers to prepare for the SAP _IBP_2311 exam?
entry.content: I would like to review some official SAP IBP 2311 exam questions ahead of the exam, however I am only able to find the same 10-ish repeating questions in the course content. Are there any past papers or official practice questions available to review? Thank you.

entry.title: Shaping the Future: SAP Analytics Cloud as a Resilient Force in the AI-Driven Evolution of Business
entry.content:
The Artificial Intelligence Storm

In today’s rapidly evolving technological world, businesses face the dual challenge of staying competitive while navigating through disruptive trends like artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). Many platforms face the risk of obsolescence as they struggle to keep pace with changing demands. Nevertheless, despite these transformation trends, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) continues to prove its relevance by adapting and integrating into a dynamic ecosystem and landscapes of the companies and benefits from a continuous commitment to improvement and adoption. SAC remains a vital tool for organizations that are seeking to derive value from their data, as it is core to SAP’s product portfolio focusing on driving future innovation.

Evolving with the AI Revolution

SAC’s Integration and Privileges in the AI Storm

AI has fundamentally shifted the way organizations approach business intelligence (BI) and analytics. Traditional dashboards and manual reports are being enhanced or even fully replaced by predictive and augmented analytics and conversational BI tools. Companies are increasingly demanding platforms capable not only of analyzing historical data but also of anticipating trends and suggesting actionable insights in real time.

SAP Analytics Cloud is not just adapting to these demands but thrives to represent such an environment itself. It embeds machine learning and AI-driven analytics directly into its core functionalities and as a result, empowers its users to go beyond descriptive analytics. For example, its predictive planning capabilities allow businesses to simulate scenarios and to plan for outcomes with the highest accuracy. SAC supports other wide range of functionalities, such as "augmented analytics," which enables  AI to guide users through complex datasets and highlight patterns

Apart from the functionalities, one of SAP Analytics Cloud’s strongest assets is its seamless integration into SAP’s product ecosystem. Businesses that are already leveraging SAP solutions—be it SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors, or SAP Ariba—find that SAC fits naturally into their workflows. This integration ensures a unified data landscape where users can access real-time insights without additional challenges or fragmented datasets.

SAC acts as a bridge between on-premises and cloud environments, allowing businesses to adopt hybrid analytics strategies. This flexibility is particularly critical for companies in industries with strict compliance requirements or those undergoing cloud transformations.

By remaining deeply embedded within the SAP portfolio, SAC reinforces its relevance. As organizations adopt new AI-driven tools and methodologies, SAC’s ability to integrate with emerging technologies ensures it evolves in parallel with the broader business environment.

Furthermore, SAP’s roadmap for SAC emphasizes agility, with regular updates and new features designed to align with emerging trends. This ensures that customers not only have access to state-of-the-art analytics but also a sense of security that their investment will remain relevant in the years to come. SAC is a dynamic platform, built to evolve and adjust in harmony with its users' needs.

Looking Ahead

The future of analytics is undeniably intertwined with Artificial Intelligence. Yet, the need for robust, reliable, and integrated BI tools remains unchanged. SAP Analytics Cloud exemplifies how a platform can adapt to technological shifts while remaining a dependable solution for businesses.

As the AI era progresses, SAC will continue to evolve, delivering actionable insights, fostering collaboration, and driving business outcomes. For organizations seeking a future-proof BI solution, SAC’s deep integration with SAP products and commitment to innovation makes it a natural choice

By focusing on integration, usability, and technological evolution, SAP Analytics Cloud is poised to remain at the forefront of analytics innovation, ensuring that businesses can thrive in an ever-changing world.

 

Andrii Pogorielov, Seda Agasarjan

Customer Services & Delivery MEE BT&A CFO Advisory

entry.title: Re: System asking to enter Access Key when creating class
entry.content: Maybe at first check if your client is set as development client :  transaction SCC4  modification should be allowed

entry.title: How can i see all employees while navigating in SuccessFactors employee central ?
entry.content:
I am currently struggling to consult an overview of all current employees withing a certain company. 

I do not want to create a report, i want to consult as an HR admin all employees under my company. 

And then select an employee from that list to update some information. 

 

It can not be that i have to know the name per person or the personID of an employee in order to be able to change certain information? Or that i have to work employee by employee.

entry.title: Re: Documented Credit Decision/Credit Decision for Document - SAP S4Hana Credit Management
entry.content:
Thank you for the thorough explanation and the detailed walkthrough.

I do have a couple of clarifications regarding the DCD screen you shared. I noticed that both the Open Credit Amount and the Checked Credit Amount fields display zero, even though the Sales Order amount is USD 10.00. Shouldn’t these fields reflect the Sales Order amount of USD 10 instead?

Additionally, regarding the multilevel approval process based on the amount, I observed that the entries for Approver 1 and Approver 2 are missing on the screen you shared. According to the configuration details you provided, it seems that the DCD could be routed to these approvers for review. Could there be additional customization required to enable these fields?

Thank you again for your assistance and insights!

entry.title: Value Identification in SAP Signavio Insights
entry.content:
Dear Community/Dear Experts,

I hope I've come to the right place with my question. I would like to know how exactly potentials are found in SAP Insights? What is the optimum procedure for value identification and valuation? Who is needed to identify and realise the potential? I am particularly interested in the quick wins that I can get from the tool.
I would be very happy to exchange experiences.

Best regards

Christine

entry.title: Variable Pay live profile view required in Employee local currency
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We have the Live profile view activated for Variable Pay and it works! The view is showing the values in Functional currency instead of Employee Local currency which is the requirement. Looking at SAP Note KBA, it seems that it is possible to do it via a change in XML. Unfortunately the information provided to make the change is quite limited and not very clear. Are you able to help guide what code changes need to be done here to make it happen? 

Thanks

2078565 - Variable Pay - Live Profile View Individual View in employee currency

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content: Is it mandatory or recommended that Joule and Work Zone to run on the same sub-account ?

entry.title: I can not create a settlement rule for some service order with Java Connector
entry.content:
Hello colleagues ,

I can not create a settlement rule for some service order with Java Connector but still able to do it with the Apab Work Bench...

//Java

JCoTable tableRange2 = fuba.getTableParameterList().getTable("IT_SRULE");

 

tableRange2.appendRow();

 

tableRange2.setRow(0);

 

tableRange2.setValue("PERCENTAGE","100") ;

tableRange2.setValue("SETTL_TYPE","PER");

tableRange2.setValue("COSTCENTER",xxxSomeNumber,ber );

tableRange2.setValue("LFDNR","1");

//

The Parameters look the same...but still getting the messages in Java-> the receiver could not be calculeted(aclually - german message below)

Programmfehler: Objektart des Empfaengers nicht ermittelbar

Fehler beim Bearbeiten der BAPI-Methoden

 

Could anybody help?

Thanks!

Irina

entry.title: Re: Invoice RPA Bot - one mail address multiple company c...
entry.content:
We get a mail every time the bot runs for every mailbox. We have 12 and the bot runs every 3 minutes......

This is an automated email powered by SAP Process Automation.
The BOT generated following log:
EXCEPTION ERROR :
No unread emails with relevant attachment type found in the inbox

That message is useless - how to configure the bot to only send on Warning and Errors

entry.title: Re: Code List based on CDS View doesn't show View Entitie...
entry.content: Hi Navi, my understanding: you are in a S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. You want to create a custom field with a value help showing Product data and as description field you want to use the description field of an already existing key user custom field. Correct? And you tried to created your own C1 released developer extensibility CDS view and you want to use this view as value help view for the new key user custom field. Correct? If this is correct then your assumption is correct. In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition it is not possible to utilize a C1 released developer extensibility CDS view as value help view for a key user custom field. You can use key user Custom CDS views as value help view for a key user custom field...but you can not use a C1 released developer extensibility CDS view as value help view for a key user custom field. Anyway: maybe I still did not fully get your context. Maybe let us continue via email in this case: g.wilhelm@sap.com. Best regards Georg

entry.title: Is it possible to self approve a Sales Order?
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

I am the approver of the workflow for sales orders, so if I create a sales order, can I approve it myself?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to self approve a Sales Order?
entry.content:
Hello,

The short answer is no. The system does not allow the sales document creator to approve their own approval requests.

If there is other approver for this same workflow and you create the sales document, it will be automatically send to the other approver that is not you.

If you are the only approver for this workflow, the document will not be send to any approver. You can find this document and forward it to other approver on the app "Work Items Without Agents".

Check more information on the SAP Note 3473042 - Message "No Users Found For Task" Triggered in Sales Document Workflow.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger script form to auto generate spool?
entry.content:
Did you try to call function like SET_PRINT_PARAMETERS ?  

to set create new spool 

print immedialty ...

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I have been trying to redeemed my campaign code but I can not purchase the free attempt due to the error: "We are unable to provide invoice as a payment option at this point. Please contact SAP Accounts Receivable."  

I have followed the guide (clear cache, different devices) but it's not working. Also, I have sent the email to SAP Accounts Receivable - Singapore email address (as I have chosen Singapore as my region) but no reply.

Please your response will be of much help. 

Thanks and regards,

Quyen

entry.title: Re: Running a Jupyter notebook in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi 
i have the same problem as someone above but I do not see any answer to that.

I tried to run :

from hana_ml import dataframe
but I get the following error 
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'hana_ml'
most likely some path issue but i do not know on how to solve this in BTP.
Thanks for your support.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app g...
entry.content:
Hi @cesar_gr, are you able to use the workaround that was documented above? i.e.:

 

  1. In SAP Business Application Studio, select `Terminal -> New Terminal` from the menu options.
  2. In the new terminal, type `npm i -g @SAP/generator-fiori@1.15.7`.  This will install the previous version of the SAP Fiori generator without this bug.
  3. Then please refresh your browser.

This should unblock you.  Please know that we are hoping to provide a hotfix update for this issue as soon as we can.

Regards,

Ian

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE in Public Edition
entry.content: Yes this is the case that if we create new bins, they are correct. Please share your findings regarding the existing correction report when available.

entry.title: DS Analytic Model oData: all/any value for parameters
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an Analytic Model that has  some variables/parameters. When I preview the data only the START_DATE and END_DATE are mandatory. However, when I'm using the oData URL Generator to create URL for data consumption, I'm prompted to fill out all possible variables (see screenshot). 

Question 1: Why is that I need to pass a value for all variables?

Question 2: What can I put to signify all/any value (equivalent to leaving a variable blank in the Data Preview selection prompt)? For example how can I pass a selection for all values for 0PLANT?

entry.title: Re: Credit Management: Is there a TCode for orders released but not invoiced yet?
entry.content: I believe this should be Purchase Orders related. Should I add the mentioned tag even if this relates to R/3 version I am using?

entry.title: Re: CJI3 - SUBMIT RKPEP003 doesn't work with parameter
entry.content: God bless you, it works... these are the parameter ID's.. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: API to read data from Manage Workforce app
entry.content:
Hello KhaingZinTun,

I think tehre is no such API available currently. You cannot read employee or work agreement masterdata. There are APIs for some HR objects, like timesheet or skills, but that's it.

You could browse the S/4HANA cloud roadmap and check if new APIs are announced. I have seen some roadmap items dealing with workforce replication and SAP MDM, maybe this can already help.

Regards,

Johannes

entry.title: Re: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content: Actually my need is like if a date is selected and if its Monday data should be shown of Friday and if any other day is selected data from previous day should be shown in Table widget in Story. Is this achievable? Appreciate if complete steps are provided.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app g...

entry.content: Hi, This is for Multi 1:1 configurations right, If the previous 4 configurations have 1:N is it possible to create 1:1 or another 1:N as 5th configuration and replicate the same table?

entry.title: Re: Possible Issue with SAP Fiori Generator v1.16.0 (ODat...
entry.content: Thanks guys for share the solution!. This workaround works for me. I use both commands in the previous comments Regards!

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
The previous version  of the UX has an edit icon available for the App Title which I found to be very helpful in creating my revs to the app under control (ie App_11.8, App_11.9 etc).  The new release does not allow the title to be changed at all.

Is there a way to change the rev. / app title ?

entry.title: Re: Code List based on CDS View doesn't show View Entitie...
entry.content:
@georg_wilhelmCould you please confirm if value helps based con Custom Entities also limit the number of entries they can retrieve from the Database? I ask you this because my value help is showing only 132 characters even when my table contains 400 entries:

by checking the Network tab in the browser, I notice the Odata call is sending top=132 by default:

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Communication arrangement SAP_COM_0301
entry.content:
Hi Christian,

You can use API-based creation of workforce or Excel-Upload in parallel. If I understand you correctly, you could import employees with SAP_COM_0301 from your HR system. And the contingent workers you could import via Excel templates. 

You mention there is no "customer master data" available, do you mean supplier master data? I assume for the contingent worker you rather need the relation BBP005 to a supplier.

Cheers, Johannes

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS API - Fiori element - control on user
entry.content: Super, it should solve my issue. Still not working but this is the solution

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Information Extraction (DOX) Service with camera
entry.content:
Thank you so much for the wonderful explanation, with your help I manage to complete the requirement.  Thank you once again and season's greetings.

Best Regards

Naim😊

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Analytic Model oData: 404 Resource Not Found
entry.content:
@mitko1994Either use space like '' or '*'. You can try both!

A quote:

"Default values may be provided. If your input parameter or variable has:

  • No default value - You must set a value for it.
  • A default value - You do not need to set a value for it and the default value will be used. You can override the default value by setting your own value."

Also since you get response code 400 I'd strongly recommend to check details in the browser development tool. Please check out SAP Datasphere > Consumption 

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: AMDP Select with TOP 3 entries based on certain fields
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I'm creating an AMDP to getting the top 3 vendors based on certain fields.
I have a table result with all the entries and now I have to build the second SELECT to get the top 3 vendors, grouped by vendor and sumerized and sorted by DMBTR
I'll apreciate your help

Kind Regards
Mariano

entry.title: Re: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata set nullable option
entry.content: You are welcome, @jrtr It's good to see all good!

entry.title: Destiny of the old SAP EHS in S/4HANA
entry.content:
We would like to know the “destiny of the EHS world” with the transition to S/4HANA; will there be a “porting” to the new versions for these modules or will they go to “End of life”?

Best Regards,

Fabrizio.

entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
Hi @sreehari_vpillai, 

If you are using in the Cloud Foundry cli, then the `-l` attribute to mark the syslog drain url should be specified. Please refer to the "Bind the Application to User Provided Service Using the Command Line Interface" section of the help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-logging/cloud-logging/ingest-via-cloud-foundry-runtime?version=Cloud#loiof5a7c993743c4ee79722479371b90b37__bind_the_application_to_user_provided_service 

  • CF docs: https://cli.cloudfoundry.org/en-US/v6/create-user-provided-service.html 
  • Examples using credentials `-p` option https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/devguide/services/log-management.html

entry.title: No bank clearing account found in cash pool Error code FIBL_RPCODE065
entry.content:
• No bank clearing account defined for Cc. Bnk Acct. Pmt Mtd." is received when attempting to generate payment from the cash pool.
  • Error code FIBL_RPCODE065.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No bank clearing account found in cash pool Error cod...
entry.content: Please follow the resolution steps provided in ##0003554324 - Error code FIBL_RPCODE065 in generating payment in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: CSRF Token Issue when calling OData Service locally i...
entry.content:
Hi Diego,

I think you are on the right track by setting the URI patch when fetching the csrf-token.

What I do no understand is that you say "we shouldn't perform a Get operation on an Action".

If you do it in Postman manually, how would you do it? I always first send a GET to the service so to fetch the csrf-token, the request goes here:

GET: https://my406xx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV/A_SupplierInvoice

and right after that I can post and create a supplier invoice in this example:

POST: https://my406566-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV/A_SupplierInvoice (with all the details in the Body)

Kind regards,

Johannes

entry.title: Re: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content: it's pretty much standard JS, with date.getDay() you can already get the weekday, then with additional if condition, you can easily achieve what you need either offset 1 or 2 or 3 days.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build - Actions
entry.content: thanks for sharing @qiushi_wang  that is a great use case!

entry.title: Standart ODATA PATCH Method not updating
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are trying to use the ODATA API https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header PATCH Method for update one field on Billing Document, we are getting HTTP 200 OK, but the field was not updated.

URL: /sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_billingdocument/srvd_a2x/sap/billingdocument/0001/BillingDocument('90000000')

 

Body(payload):

{
  "CityCode" : "NY"

}

HTTP Method: PATCH

 

=>> Attachment below.

Please, any tips?

 

Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Commerce Automation PO and GR from Non SAP to Ariba Network and to Ariba Invoice Management Solution
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Can someone please confirm if the below scenarios are possible? Our landscape is we use Non-SAP ERP for creating Purchase Orders and Goods Receipts and we have SAP BTP as middleware. We have Commerce Automation and Ariba Invoice Management solutions with us. 

1. Purchase Orders created, Updated and Cancelled from Non-SAP ERP System to Ariba Network and then to Ariba Invoice Management.

2. Goods Receipt created, updated or Reversed from Non-SAP ERP System to Ariba Network and then to Ariba Invoice Management.

Can someone please confirm if you have worked on the above scenarios in Ariba when dealing with a Non-SAP ERP System and how would you capture the PO updates and GR updates to send to Network and from there or directly from BTP, can we bring the PO and GR and their relevant updates to Ariba Invoice Management? Any help or guidance on this would be much appreciated?

Also, if you have any documentation or guidance on how to get the PO Copy from Network to Ariba Invoice Management solution, please guide.

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM
entry.content:
The free monthly webinar provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news directly from SAP's topic experts!

With the monthly SAP Community Call for ALM, you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

For slides and recordings click here.

Please register here!

entry.title: ilx - act as: Overdue Trainings Reminder not available
entry.content:
Hello all,

The new function Reminder of overdue trainings is not available in the new team view or ilx home page if it is  called via the act as function.

I created an improvement request. Please vote in favour if you also miss the function.

Thanks

Best regards

Conny

entry.title: Re: How to trigger script form to auto generate spool?
entry.content:
You could also

  • Execute the first SUBMIT with additions WITHOUT SPOOL DYNPRO and TO SAP-SPOOL spool_options (build this structure spool_options with FM GET_PRINT_PARAMETERS to prevent some immediate print and delete)
  • Get the spool number of the created spool request which is contained in a SPA/GPA parameter named SPI, using GET PARAMETER ID 'SPI' FIELD spoolno.

entry.title: Re: Download Process Flows SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello CP_PL, 

Thank you for reaching out.

Currently, Process Flows can only be downloaded through the "Transformation Planning" feature. This section provides access to all relevant process flows for your SAP S/4HANA transformation.

As you rightly noted, the process flows displayed here are identical to those in the "End-to-End" process area. It is just another entry point into your processes, showing only the process flows tied to best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, both public and private editions.

I hope this helps you a little. Please let me know if you have any further questions.Best, 
Veronika

entry.title: Re: Build a dynamic rolling forecast with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Absolutely great functionality that brings a lot of flexibility! Thank you.
Just a few challenges left:
1) Is there a way to link the version to the most current forecast/budget version in the model, or linked to version context from a central calendar planning process?
2) Can we show 2024 and 2025 quarter and full year totals (where actuals + plan data are summed) dynamically?

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q3 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hi Esmee, great blog !! I'll bookmark this for later ..

BR, Gokhan

entry.title: Enterprise Search in SAP Build Work Zone - Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are using SAP Build Work Zone - Standard Edition with backends as S/4HANA Private Edition, Ariba, Successfactors, MDM, GRC etc.

1) Enterprise Search works fine in my S/4HANA, however I am not able to see/configure it in my Build Workzone..what is missing and how do I move it up so that I can search through all my SAP systems.

2) How to make Enterprise search work for SAP Cloud systems like Ariba, Successfactors etc ?

Regards,
Rajan Murthy

entry.title: SAP CDC working as OIDC RP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to set up SSO from Jainrain application to SAP CDC application, where we will be using SAP CDC as relying party (RP) and Janrain as OP. 

As per the documentation, we supplied OP with Redirect URI as ( https://socialize.eu1.gigya.com/socialize.finalizeOidcLogin?) and configured both OP and RP with details. 

Once SSO button at OP is clicked, we are triggering socialLogin call to SAP CDC. 

gigya.accounts.socialLogin ( 

provider:'oidc-myopsite', authFlow: 'redirect',    redirectURL: 'https://mywebsitelink'

);

Once we hit, accounts.sociallogin, authorize endpoint is called at OP, then it is redirected to there proxy page, which will check if session is present in OP or not, if active session is there at OP, it will redirect to, https://socialize.eu1.gigya.com/socialize.finalizeOidcLogin? along with code.

which gives, General Server Error. 

Please find below the entire call for your reference, 

https://socialize.eu1.gigya.com/socialize.finalizeOidcLogin?code=st2.s.AtLtVFxJmg.WPPZXcqHWHy03XG2-HoEZYH46NPur0VcSspI4pMXi4ppPulLGIsGnOg4XW4zLx0EnMOYHIfM7vxneZmeee5oZO1CsPkbNvQKBynLZsjo-tfwqzTKOS-1SpCrcJYByzw-.-hKQP7KZ1ck1tmMdzMcsbpmZInNPLfRbCp4qAjl8wEnz1kXRzOcfp5XU7nv7MnvTVSeucdiGqHZ657CdgGmnsw.sc3&state=tk2.oi.AtLtu3M6lQ.RXLLl3J9uWcKX3ilCougbRBq9ITlDpoccr1r-3PI4LXBjEaj1Ohh3LDQHwTWyFiJ.DuZvpX9sUObU2ROXWMdYwmZSQsL7c3iZ5lN8mRK1leGZYig1SlyOPH97bjzliOvkUXFEDd71W5SJvEaAqI7udg.sc3yc463l70n4055151h7 

Which is giving us the error,

errorMessage: 'General Server Error',
requestId: 'aac6a08e1e2747879173e47c791f91e4',

To conclude, We are trying RP initiated OIDC flow with SAP CDC working as RP, once someone clicks on SSO button at OP end, it hits accounts.socialLogin -> OP authorize end point is called -> if session is there at OP, Proxy page redirects to -> https://socialize.eu1.gigya.com/socialize.finalizeOidcLogin? along with the code, which ends in error. There is no direction given in CDC documentation to understand the flow when CDC will act as RP. 

let me know if anyone have implemented any such scenarios or use cases where you were using CDC as RP, just want to get ideas on what we are doing wrong. Thanks.

SAP Community SAP Customer Data Cloud #Authentication

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Analytic Model oData: 404 Resource Not Found
entry.content: Thanks, Tuncay. I tried with '*' and I get a 400 bad request: Bad Request Error: Unable to process asset parameters: _0EANUPC is not a defined parameter. Please, check parameters definition."

entry.title: SPROXY End to End Testing - Shop -> PI 7.5 ->S4HANA Scenario
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding a project I’m currently working on. Let me provide some background details for better context.

Background

We have a scenario that consists of four main steps:

  1. A Webshop sends an order to the Process Integration (PI) system.
  2. The PI system receives the message via SOAP, validates its structure, and forwards it to the backend system via HTTP. A valid and working HTTP destination is already configured for this.
  3. In the backend system, using SPROXY, we handle the namespace of the ESR (Enterprise Service Repository) and can view all design objects. A service provider processes the message, forwards it to an ABAP class, which extracts the relevant data, fills a BAPI, and finally creates a sales document in the SAP backend using the payload data.
  4. This scenario has been running smoothly, and the existing functionality is working perfectly.

New Requirement

The requirements have now changed. The webshop will send two new optional fields if they are available. To address this, we made the following changes:

  • The PI structure was updated to handle these two fields (this part is already completed and working).
  • In the backend, the ABAP class logic was updated to:
    • Map these new fields if provided.
    • Pass the new data into a newly declared table. This table will handle the additional fields in parallel with the existing configuration.

With this update, the new fields will be processed as follows:

  • If the fields are present in the payload, they are mapped to the new table and passed along with the original tables to the BAPI.
  • If the fields are not provided, the process will continue as before, without impacting the existing functionality.

After implementing these changes, the scenario appears to function correctly. Messages sent from the PI Test Tool are successfully delivered to the backend.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Current Challenge

When testing through the PI Test Tool, I see that the messages are being delivered to the backend. However, I am unable to verify if the sales document is being created correctly or if the new fields are included when provided.

Request

Can you guide me on how to perform an end-to-end test to ensure the functionality works as expected? Specifically:

  • Which SAP transactions can I use to check if the sales document has been created successfully and verify the inclusion of the new fields? Which data can I use for the search process?
  • If debugging is needed, how can I:
    • Import the payload into the ABAP code for testing?
    • Check if the message sent from the PI Test Tool is properly processed in the backend?

Any help in verifying this scenario end-to-end would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Restful ABAP Object Page #LINEITEM_REFERENCE
entry.content: Thanks for your information

entry.title: Re: Credit Exposure Update
entry.content: Hi @pgunda79, Which approach did you follow. Did you face any issue with the selected approach later?

entry.title: Custom Field not available in SAP Standart ODATA API Activated
entry.content:
Hi Guys!

We have added a Custom Field "Link" to vf03 Billing Document Header Details.

We have activated the standard Billing Document ODATA https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header,  but the Custom Field "Link" is no appearing in the metadata.

We need this field to be available in this ODATA Standart https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header that we have activated.

 

=>> Attachment below.

Plese, any tips?

 

Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Producer Sync Issues - Unsorted and Local Trash
entry.content:
Hello, 

My team just notified me that starting 12/16/24, when they open producer and sync their workspace, certain objects (either a full course, book page, simulation) are going to either their Unsorted Folder or Local Trash or from Unsorted to Local Trash. 

I just did a test on my side and synced my workarea and a developer confirmed that an object prior to me syncing wasn't in the trash but now it is.

Has anyone else faced this issue?

entry.title: Re: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content: So it will filter out the data for the date as yesterday? or 3 days before?

entry.title: Re: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content: basically a calender should be there as story filter, and once the date is selected it should go back and filter previous day if its any other day than monday and it should show up friday data filtered out, if the date is selected as monday.

entry.title: Consuming a released event of an unreleased RAP BO (how to achieve clean core)
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are confused. I was advised that the events in the accelerator hub can be consumed either via local or remote event consumption.

https://api.sap.com/event/OP_PRODUCTEVENTS/overview

Currently, local event consumption applies to RAP BO events. So I searched for the released RAP BO for products (https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_PRODUCTTP_2) and tried to create and implement and event handler class.

First thing that I noticed is that the events being raised are not there in the released RAP BO.

After further checking, I saw that the event is actually defined at the base BO level.

I did some further testing and found out that these events are being from the Manage Product Master fiori app by calling these static methods which in turn raises the RAP BO events.

Now, when I tried to consume these events using the released RAP BO, the system won't allow me because the events are defined at the base BO level. We are using S/4HANA 2023 private cloud edition (FPS00). We are not sure if the same behavior is there in the FPS version.

When I checked the SAP documentation(https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/business-event-consumption), it says that the event to be consumed needs to be exposed in a C1 released RAP BO interface.

However, the events are not exposed for most of the released RAP BOs interfaces (e.g., Product, Business Partner, Pricing). For these 3 RAP BOs, the events are only exposed in the base RAP BO.

The only way we can consume this is to create the event handler class under a 'Standard ABAP' package so that it will allows us to consume the event from the unreleased base RAP BO. We are trying to achieve clean core and we are limiting any Tier 3 developments. Is there a way to consume these events via Tier 1 approach without resorting to using SAP event mesh? SAP event mesh is usually only recommended if the event producer and consumer is different but in our case, the producer/consumer is the same S4H system.

Note: We are trying to use these events to replace the BTE functionality.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content: Boa tarde! Qual é a badi/função/enhancement que deve ser incluída a lógica de preenchimento do campo INDDEDUZDESON, que agora existe na tela do item da nota fiscal por favor ? Essa função? Essa é uma alternativa J_1BNF_MERGE_BADI_FIELDS? Obrigada!

entry.title: Re: AMDP Select with TOP 3 entries based on certain fields
entry.content:
There is no "group by vendor". It's only sorted by DMBTR (descending).

About ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), and DENSE_RANK() Funct... - SAP Community (ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by ...) ROW_num where ROW_num <= 3)

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
@luize_boyen @lipe_flores , acabei de fazer a pergunta acima. As notas já foram aplicadas e na função mencionada eu tenho a seguinte linha de código:  ls_nflin-inddeduzdeson = ls_nflin_badi-inddeduzdeson. "3423950.

Obrigada!

entry.title: Condition Contract for Sales - Manual Delta Accruals
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

we have implemented the Condition Contract for sales in an S/4HANA Project, and introduced the manual delta accrual document to manage both data migration and unplanned delta accruals.

While we are able to post manual delta accruals correctly using the RENT pricing condition (the CC is also updated inserting a new date in the settlement calenar), we encounter errors when issuing follow-on documents:

  1. Without specifying the RENT condition in the Condition Type Group for Accruals (as per standard configuration):

    • Automatic delta accruals are processed correctly.
    • However, the amount booked as "manual delta accrual" is not reversed during the final settlement run.

  2. With RENT condition specified in the Condition Type Group for Accruals (RENT condition type assigned to "Tgt AccReversal" as REA2 and "Tgt CType Daccr" as RED2):

    • The first automatic delta accrual reverses the amount booked as "manual delta accrual."

Could you please provide guidance on how to resolve these issues?

Thank you

Michele

entry.title: Re: Credit Management: Is there a TCode for orders releas...
entry.content:
Try ME2L (or ME2M) with Selection parameters such as WE02

  • You can create new selection parameters within Customizing: Purchasing, Reporting, Maintain Purchasing Lists, Selection Parameters, Define Selection Parameters (SM30 V_160S)

entry.title: Re: Credit Management: Is there a TCode for orders released but not invoiced yet?
entry.content: Ok for me, you could also add MM Purchasing

Janmeet

entry.title: Authorizations for SAP Business Technology Plattform - a quick start
entry.content:
1. Introduction to Clean Core:

For SAP customers, hybrid authorization concepts are especially vital under the SAP clean core strategy. With this approach the aim is to keep the core SAP systems lean, minimizing customizations for easier maintenance and updates: 

Having a closer look into the so-called side – by – side extensions, we recognize the following typical architecture: 

Business Data is transferred to SAP BTP (e.g. using SAP Smart Data Access – SAP SDA / SAP Smart Data Integration – SAP SDI) and stored in SAP HANA Cloud as part of a CAP Application running on SAP Business Technology Platform. 

Such an architecture requires protection on two different levels: 

1. Structuring the access to the apps via SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition Roles 

2. Restricting the access on business data level (e.g. display / change, restrict to dedicated company codes, plants, …) 

In this blogpost, we will focus on the second restriction level. 

2. Overview of SAP BTP Levels and their Authorization Management 

To understand the authorization management on SAP BTP, it is important to know the setup of the platform and its levels. When managing authorization on the levels, each is handled separately, and permissions are granted independently. For example, a role on a global account level will not be available in subaccounts. 

On each level below, predefined role collections can be granted. A role collection is a set of individual roles that includes permissions for various resources and services on SAP BTP. It can contain one or multiple roles. 

Global Account: 

The Global Account is the highest level in SAP BTP's organizational structure. 

It represents the contractual boundary of your SAP BTP subscription. On this level it is possible to create custom role collections besides the predefined role collections. 

Directory: 

Directories can optionally be used to group subaccounts for better organization and shared resource management. 

Subaccount: 

Subaccounts are created within the Global Account and are used to manage entitlements, quotas, and assign services specific to each subaccount. On this level it is also possible to create custom role collections besides the predefined role collections. The subaccount level is the most important level for authorization management, as you can create custom roles to protect business applications.  

Org (Organization): 

In the context of Cloud Foundry environments, an Org is used to manage and isolate resources. 

Space: 

Spaces are created within Orgs. It is a logical container that is used for app development, deployment and maintenance. 

3. Authorization Management on the Subaccount Level – Creating a custom role  

Creating custom roles for business applications at the subaccount level requires interaction across three domains. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you understand this process: 

3.1 Provision Role Templates by SAP BTP Developer (grey box) 

The first step involves setting up role templates, which are provided by the SAP BTP Developer. These templates can be tailored within the customer’s business application based on existing attributes and scope. 

  • Scope: Defines the actions an app needs to execute specific functions, such as editing, viewing, or deleting. 
  • Attributes: Used to specify static or instance-based authorizations that vary depending on the context, such as location, department, or cost center. Attributes help refine business users' authorizations, particularly concerning organizational levels like plants or company codes. 

3.2 User Account and Authentication (UAA) Level managed by SAP BTP Authorization Administrator (blue box)

At this stage, role templates transform into roles and role collections. Here's how it works: 

  • A role directly corresponds to a created role template. 
  • A single role template can inform multiple roles by creating roles with different attributes. 
  • These roles need to be assigned to one or more role collections. A role collection can encompass multiple roles, enhancing flexibility in user permissions. 

3.3 Assigning Roles to Users by User Administrator (green box) 

  • Direct Assignment: Assign one or more role collections directly to users on the User Account and Authentication level. 
  • Group Assignment: Assign one or more role collections to user groups. Note that roles cannot be directly assigned to individual users or user groups. 

By following these steps, you can effectively create and manage custom roles for business applications, ensuring that users have the appropriate permissions to perform their tasks efficiently. 

4. Quick Start Service and Tool Support (by SAP Consulting)

The role concept for SAP Business Technology Platform can become complex quickly, if business data is stored as part of a CAP Application. Just let us validate the following (fictive) example: 

A medium / large size customer plans to cover his plant maintenance processes via a clean core approach and requires three extensions which are developed on SAP Business Technology Platform. All three applications have a simple authorization concept consisting of an admin role, an expert role and a display role, so we have overall 9 functional roles available. Decentralized access is required for 20 plants, so the security team has to manage 180 BTP roles. 

The SAP Service provides the following features: 

  • Knowledge Transfer Workshop for BTP Authorizations 

Learn how the Authorizations on SAP BTP are managed. Get a Deep Dive on the BTP Levels, Role Collections and Roles and Role Templates.  

  • A best practice basis role concept for a quick start of the SAP BTP development project 

The customer can utilize the best practice role templates provided by SAP to get a quick start on their project. This will help them quickly structure their role management for BTP operations, BTP security, BTP developer and tester. 

  • AIRC BTP Role Collection Generator 

- UI5 User Interface: 

The UI5 interface will provide the customer with an user-friendly way to manage and track their roles and role collections, making it easier for the authorization team to monitor and adjust access controls as needed. 

- Download Roles and Role Collections via Excel: 

The customer’s security team can use this feature to export their role and role collection configurations into Excel. This is beneficial for documentation, audits, and for backup purposes.

- Update Roles and Role Collections via Excel: 

With this feature, the customer will be able to make bulk updates to their roles and role collections through Excel. This is useful for managing changes efficiently, especially when adjustments need to be made across multiple roles or role collections.

- Transfer Roles and Role Collections via Excel across subaccounts: 

With this feature it is possible to transport roles and role collections across the system landscape (dev, qas, prd) as long there is no integration into transport management. Another use case is to transfer your basis role concept across different subaccounts.

If you are interested in this service, please get in contact with the authors of this blogpost.

5. Introduction to Authorization Management Service (AMS) 

Authorization Management Service (AMS) is a new, improved method to develop and manage user authorizations for SAP Business Technology Platform applications in a centralized way. This blogpost will not further focus on details of this service, but conclude with the general recommendations which technology to choose in which situation: 

  • For new developments, the usage of AMS is recommended 
  • It is not mandatory to update existing developments to AMS. However, using AMS can benefit your overall authorization management posture in BTP and help manage BTP authorizations more effectively. Unfortunately, there is no automatic migration to AMS possible so that developments must be adapted, and policies must be created and distributed “manually”. 

Currently, the Role Collection Generator just covers the classical approach. With the availability of corresponding interfaces, the role collection generator will also cover AMS. 

The following source provide some further information on AMS: 

  • Configuring Authorization Policies 
  • Assign Authorization Policies 
  • AMS in the CAP “Golden Path” documentation 

6. Wrapping it up – What are the key takeaways? 

Hybrid authorizations are crucial for SAP solution extensions in the context of the SAP clean core strategy. SAP BTP involves multiple levels where authorizations are managed separately. Custom roles and role collections can be created and assigned at the subaccount level, ensuring appropriate user permissions. Tools like the AIRC Role Collection Generator and Authorization Management Service streamline role management and enhance security. If you want to learn more about SAP S/4HANA authorization concepts, please visit our first blog.

entry.title: Word Table tags For Accessibility
entry.content:
For accessibility purposes we may be required to add tags to the Word based schedules/tables In Disclosure Management.

There is a Word feature for table properties > alt text tab title and description fields. These are overwritten when the data links are refreshed (as expected).
Any other ideas for labeling the tables?

Maybe the XBRL tags? Not familiar with their usage.

Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: Re: Possible Issue with SAP Fiori Generator v1.16.0 (ODat...
entry.content: Thank you, JungHeeChan and saurabh__khare, for sharing the solution! Downgrading with the suggested command worked perfectly for me as well. Much appreciated!

entry.title: Re: How to Link SRGBTBREL-BRELGUID with SOFFPHIO-PHIO_ID????
entry.content:
Hi,
We would like to get the information based on SOFFCONT1 PHIO_ID. However the note describes only option to identify the PHIO_ID from SRGBTBREL table. 
I am looking for option to establish relation between SOFFCONT1-PHIO_ID with SRGBTBREL-BRELGUID.
Any suggestions will be really helpful!!
Thanks and Regards,

Vignesh Sridhar.

entry.title: Re: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content: these lines of code just set the default day offset for the story current date picker, then the data filtering is just based how the time range filter defined which is associated with this current date picker .

entry.title: Deep Link for Completed Forms goes to Inbox
entry.content:
We use a deep link to the completed forms folder (sf/completed-comp-forms) in our completed notifications. Post 2H release, we have noticed that the previously working link takes us to the forms inbox instead.

Has anyone else experienced this behavior? Is there a solution to have the deep link navigate to the completed forms unfiled folder which is the standard SF folder?

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Download Process Flows SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hi @CP_PL 

One addition to the answer of my colleague @Veronika_: Downloading the abovementioned content will be a feature request and a ticket via SAP for Me is required to proceed. Regarding your second question, you may also check out the user guide to see what process flows are in the End-to-End Processes and Transformation Planning.

Kind regards

Ascha

entry.title: TIME_OUT Error in FBL3N and FAGLL03 Transactions After Upgrade to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are encountering a recurring TIME_OUT error when executing the transactions FBL3N and FAGLL03 after upgrading our SAP system from ECC6 to S/4HANA. These transaction (FBL3N) worked correctly in our previous ECC6 environment, but they fail to execute in S/4HANA.

Details of the Issue:

  1. Transaction Name: FBL3N / FAGLL03
  2. System Version:
    • Previous: SAP ECC 6.0
    • Current: SAP S/4HANA
  3. Selection Criteria Used:
    • Date range: [e.g., 01.01.2023 to 31.12.2023]
    • Accounts: [e.g.,3*]
    • Other filters: [e.g., company code 1000].
    • Line items selection :
    • Status : All Line Items
  4. Error Details:
    • Error: TIME_OUT
    • Program: [e.g., SAPLFBL3 or SAPMF05L].

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Attachments in mobile services Can anyone help me?
entry.content: Most likely the service will provide a REST API you can use.  You would need to create a destination in Mobile Services pointing to this service with the necessary security/authentication.  In the MDK app you can use the SendRequest action or clientAPI call to then interact with the REST API.  Since the API is defined by the service you will need to look into their documentation for details of what and how to call it.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative voucher
entry.content:
@David Chaviano 

Could you kindly assist in getting the vouchers for them for the free attempt?

I would greatly appreciate your help with this matter.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: Relaxed Flow not working in Work Center POD
entry.content:
Hi,

With Relaxed Flow ON, you can have a QTY > 0 SFC active in multiple operations at the same time.

With Relaxed Flow OFF, you can´t start the next operation until the whole qty is completed in the previous operation.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with ABAP: How to Create Help View and Search Help Part 1
entry.content: Informative post for beginners like me

entry.title: Re: Code List based on CDS View doesn't show View Entitie...
entry.content:
I answer myself.

It seems the paging on the Custom Entity class must be handled in a different way when the caller is a value help. Or at least that's my understanding.

I had to call following method before performing paging:

io_response->set_total_number_of_records( LINES( lt_FreightCode_tab ) ).

By doing this, the Value Help now shows the correct total number of entries at the top and performs the paging correctly when I scroll down.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Learning System options for practice
entry.content:
Hi @LeahL , 

The type of permission that you are looking for corresponds to the Learning Management (LMS) module, which is not included in the THR80 - Exploring SAP SuccessFactors Platform, but it would be in scope for the THR88 - Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Learning. 

If you are following this learning journey https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/explore-the-sap-successfactors-platform the Learning System Access is THR80

If you are following this learning journey https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/configuring-sap-successfactors-learning the Learning System Access is THR88

Hope this will help, 

Regards, 

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Attachments in mobile services Can anyone help me?
entry.content: @Bill Froelich, Hi thanks I have already tried but I get error, (HTTP status on the back is 412), I was hoping to find documentation on how to set up the action sendrequest or another way to get the image sent when it is captured by the phone, maybe you know another way to do it other than the one mentioned in the message?

entry.title: Re: fb60 posting error:‘format for reference document number is invalid’
entry.content: In SAP S4 HANA 2023, the new path is as follow

entry.title: Empowering AI Innovation: How Software Partners benefit from SAP Business AI
entry.content:
SAP’s software partners are essential in delivering innovative solutions and driving accelerated roadmaps for customers. Generative AI continues to maintain strong momentum in the market, creating exciting opportunities for our software partners: with the power of SAP Business AI, partners are uniquely positioned to address diverse customer needs and foster business growth.

AI technology is rapidly evolving with the potential to reshape industries globally, increasing a projected economic impact of $4.1 trillion (the figure is comparable Germany's annual GDP!) over the next three years. As AI becomes more widely adopted, solutions without AI capabilities risk being obsolete. While challenges remain, enterprise ready AI solutions already create immense customer value.

SAP partners differentiate by integrating AI capabilities into their solutions and thereby transforming decision-making, automate processes, and enhance customer experiences. For example:

Sodales for Enterprise Health, Safety, and Employee Relations (SAP Endorsed App) leverages AI to streamline incident reporting and policy management, improving workplace safety and compliance.

“Developing on SAP's GenAI Hub allows us to leverage cutting edge AI technologies within SAP Business Technology Platform, enabling faster innovation, scalable solutions, and a competitive edge in the AI-driven market.” Sana Salam, CEO of Sodales Solutions

The Greenwashing Detector uses AI to analyze corporate disclosures and social media, detecting misleading sustainability claims and enhancing transparency within SAP Sustainability Control Tower.

“The GenAI hub is a gamechanger for us in the SAP universe. SAP acts as an AI orchestrator, leveraging SAP BTP's capabilities.” Peter Umscheid, CEO of msg global solutions

Agil AI TimeManager utilizes AI for time tracking, scheduling, and labor compliance, boosting productivity and reducing costs within the SAP ecosystem.

“SAP GenAI Hub on SAP BTP unites AI, GenAI, and LL Models with powerful SAP BTP technologies and top development tools, streamlining innovation with a single contract.“ Thomas Neuhaus, Head of Digital Experience Services at Agilita

These solutions are all powered by the SAP BTP Generative AI Hub as the technology backbone: With the BTP GenAI Hub, SAP offers straightforward technical and commercial access to a diverse array of Large Language Models (LLMs), enabling businesses to choose the best model that suits their specific needs. Businesses benefit from the flexibility of not being restricted to a single LLM provider, which allows them to adapt to changing needs and opt for providers that offer the most advanced solutions. 

The SAP Generative AI Hub comes equipped with features like AI Lifecycle Management including prompt templating, data masking, and input filtering, enhancing the orchestration of AI capabilities, and ensuring more secure and user-friendly application development.

How to get started?

The potential for partner innovations in AI is vast, from predictive maintenance and demand forecasting to personalized marketing and optimized supply chain management. As AI continues to evolve, opportunities for SAP partners will further expand. 

To allow for a fast start, we have launched the AI Build Acceleration Package

The incentive accompanies the creation and promotion of your AI solutions, complete with expert support and community resources. Don’t miss out on commercial benefits such as visibility features and the AI certification:

Register now to start leveraging SAP's Business AI platform and bring your innovative AI use cases to life.

For additional information, visit:

  • SAP Partner Portal Pages
  • Explore SAP Business AI on SAP PartnerEdge
  • SAP Business AI
  • SAP Business Technology Platform
  • SAP Partner Benefits Catalog – AI Build Acceleration Package

For further questions, feedback or co-innovation ideas please feel free to reach out to GenAIpartners@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Merit calculation to be to be based on Custom Current...
entry.content:
Hi @swagatikapanda 

No you can only use a custom field with ID = meritTarget (and you also have to switch a tag at the bottom of the XML to “Target”) and import the data from EC for it or import it through UDF if no EC. That field cannot be controlled by a formula so no lookup table possible. Search for community, implementation guide and KBAs on this.

Another option is to use compounding which allows us to base the merit increase off of merit + another recommendation column for example (extra). 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: fb60 posting error:‘format for reference document number is invalid’
entry.content: SIMG--Cross Application Componenet---General Application Function---Document Reporting Compliance---Country/Region Specific Setting---Argentina---Statutory Reporting---Last Official Document Number---General Setting----Assign Document Class to Document Type

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center - Preparing Transport Request from Source tenant
entry.content:
I have a few questions about this process.

  • If I want to put the system's default messages in the bundle, is it possible to do everything at once?
  • If I put a configuration in the Bundle, every time I make a change to the object do I have to put it back in the Bundle?
  • Can I put all the configuration in the same bundle? Is this a good practice? For example, everything related to Time Management (Time Types, Workflows, Time Profile, Rules...)

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Difference between GR/IR control & GR/IR Indicator in...
entry.content:
• GR/IR clearing
    This function clears the Purchases in Transit and Unbilled Payables accounts when the goods received and the associated invoices are recorded. It determines any differences between the values of the goods receipts and the invoices. 
     
  • GR/IR indicator
    If the GR/IR indicator is set to mandatory in the PO field selection group GR/IR Control, the error "Enter GR non-valuated" will be raised.
